message:
test(e2e): Add budget exhaustion scenario test

Adds e2e_budget_exhaustion_triggers_cancellation to verify that deadline-
driven cancellation (budget exhaustion) correctly triggers the cancellation
protocol with appropriate cancel reason flags.

The test validates:
- CancelReason::deadline() properly indicates time exceeded
- Task transitions through CancelRequested → Cancelling → Finalizing → Completed
- CancellationProtocolOracle validates the state machine transitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
